      About this item

      • SUPER SLIM. SUPER LIGHT: Galaxy S25 Edge is surprisingly light and our slimmest S Series phone yet. You’ll want to show off this sleek, super-slim design that slips easily into your pocket or bag without bulking things up.
      • OUR POWERFUL 200MP CAMERA ON OUR SLIMMEST S SERIES PHONE: Capture every memory in stunning clarity with our highest-resolution camera on a Galaxy phone. Galaxy S25 Edge features a 200MP camera to preserve your memories with professional-level detail.
      • MORE POWER TO YOU: Reimagine what’s possible with Galaxy S25 Edge, featuring our most powerful processor yet. Effortlessly translate your calls, slow down a video or edit your photos without skipping a beat
      • NOT SLIM ON TOUGHNESS: Don’t let the sleek form of Galaxy S25 Edge fool you — this phone is tough too. With a titanium build and a Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 2 face, S25 Edge is as strong as it is stylish
      • VIRTUAL ASSISTANT, PERSONAL HELP: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend — your Galaxy S25 Edge handles multiple tasks with a single ask.²
      • INSIGHTS THAT KEEP YOU A STEP AHEAD: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it. Galaxy S25 Edge provides you with personalized insights to help you prepare for your day.³
      • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: With Galaxy S25 Edge, you can capture wow-worthy videos, even in dark or noisy environments. Use Night Video to capture your evening out with friends in vivid detail. Then minimize unwanted sounds.⁴
      • CAPTURE EVERYONE'S GOOD SIDE EVERY TIME: Make every group pic perfect. It feels like in every photo, there is always one or two blinking or not smiling. With Galaxy S25 Edge, you can make sure everyone looks their best.⁵
      • SELFIES THAT STUN: Effortlessly elevate your selfie game on Galaxy S25 Edge. Galaxy AI recognizes your environment’s lighting and captures accurate skin tones and textures so each portrait brings out everyone’s best side — without the extra editing.⁵,⁶
      • A SHORTCUT TO YOUR BEST SHOTS: Looking for that picture of your dog wearing a leprechaun costume from St. Patrick’s Day? Simply describe the pic to your Galaxy S25 Edge and it finds it for you in seconds.
      Show more

        Jonny’s Musts
        Earns commissions
        Customer ReviewSamsung Galaxy S25 EDGE Unboxing!See Full Review

        Product Description

        Introducing Galaxy S25 Edge, our slimmest S Series phone yet¹ that’s packed with features without weighing down your lifestyle – and especially not your fit. It combines our powerful 200MP camera and an industry-leading processor into the ultimate lightweight device that you’ve been waiting for.

        Be ready to capture extraordinary moments with a high-resolution camera that lets you snap crystal-clear photos. At night, reveal the unseen with AI-powered Nightography for photos that shine bright.²

        With S25 Edge, you’ll always look your best too. Portrait Selfie enhances skin tones for a polished, natural look.³ And Best Face captures everyone’s good side every time — it can even save the day when someone in your group shot accidentally blinks.⁴

        Discover a true AI companion with a phone that does more for you. From daily briefings⁵ to knocking out multiple tasks with one ask,⁶ S25 Edge impressively handles your needs in seconds so you can spend more time doing other things you love.

        But don’t be fooled by its slim size. S25 Edge is made with a tough titanium frame and a durable Corning ® Gorilla® Glass Ceramic 2 face that stands up to your day. It’s powerful too, with a processor that handles AI features flawlessly and an all-day battery built to keep up with all you do.⁷

        Galaxy S25 Edge: Packed with features. Light on your fit.

        ¹Excluding camera lenses.

        ²Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).

        ³Results may vary depending on light condition and/or shooting condition including multiple subjects, being out of subject, or moving subjects.

        ⁴Motion Photo must be turned on. Best Face captures a Motion Photo up to 3 seconds. Will identify and provide results for up to 5 people. Resulting image up to 12MP.

        ⁵Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection and/or consent to access data). Personal data intelligence must be enabled.

        ⁶Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC.

        ⁷Based on average battery life under typical usage conditions. Average expected performance based on typical use. Actual battery life depends on factors such as network, features selected, frequency of calls, and voice, data, and other application usage patterns. Results may vary. Charger not included. Use only Samsung approved chargers and cables. Do not use worn or damaged chargers or cables. An incompatible charger or cable can cause damage to your device and/or serious injuries.

        How customer reviews and ratings work

        Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

        To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

        Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

        Customers say

        Customers find the phone to be a true flagship device with excellent build quality, lightweight design, and good appearance. The camera receives positive feedback, with one customer highlighting its 200MP capabilities, and customers appreciate its value for money. The performance and battery life receive mixed reviews - while some say everything runs fast and lasts a day, others report basic functionality issues and insufficient battery capacity.
        AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

        Customers praise the phone's build quality, noting it feels like a true flagship device.
        "Great phone at a discounted price. It has 99% of the flagship features you'd get from the plus and ultra galaxy phones at a slimmer body...." Read more
        "Amazing phone, and the battery life isn't bad for me since I don't really use my phone much...." Read more
        "Ended up returning bc I got iPhone Air, however this Edge is a fantastic phone if you like Android and Samsung. Feels wonderful in the hand!" Read more
        "Excellent phone. Wish I hadn't needed it when I did but it's an improvement from a few years ago." Read more

        Customers appreciate that the phone is lightweight.

        "Great phone, slim, light, great speed, great screen. I use it all day without completely draining the battery." Read more

        "...The moment I picked it up, I could tell it's the lightest phone I've ever held...." Read more

        Customers find the phone offers excellent value for money.

        "I really like how thin this phone is even with a case. It's thinner and lighter than anyone elses phone in my family" Read more
        "Great phone, slim, light, great speed, great screen. I use it all day without completely draining the battery." Read more
        "Very thin, nice build quality. Battery meh. Finger print reader is fast under a very nice screen." Read more
        "The slimness of the device is out of this world, it's beautiful. I bought this on a sale and I am more than satisfied with it...." Read more

        "Great camera and fast processor. Exceptional screen quality and features. Underwhelming battery life for a power user" Read more

        "...So to sum it up the phone is fast with adequate memory, lightweight and has a nice screen...." Read more
        "...troubleshooting, returning, and waiting — all while being without a working phone and unable to do my work...." Read more
        "...The quality feels solid and reliable, and it performs its function very well. It’s easy to use and meets all the descriptions provided...." Read more
        "Great camera and fast processor. Exceptional screen quality and features. Underwhelming battery life for a power user" Read more
        25 customers mention battery life, 15 positive, 10 negative25 customers mention "Battery life"15 positive10 negative
        Customers have mixed experiences with the phone's battery life, with some reporting it lasts a full day while others find it inadequate and note that charging is slower than expected.
        "...Battery life is phenomenal. It was easy to get this phone added to my T-Mobile account using a digital SIM card...." Read more
        "Phone stopped taking a charge after 8 months of use. Now totally worthless!! Update: Still having charging issues!!..." Read more
        "Amazing phone, durable, good battery life, look sleek." Read more
        "My only gripe is the battery life is not very good and I do miss my SD card. I like everything else. I upgraded from a non flagship android." Read more

        5.0 out of 5 stars

        Reviews with images

        Previous slide
        Next slide
        Amazon Customer
        5 out of 5 stars
        Great phone, if you understand the trade-offs
        CONS: * no telephoto lens. That sucks, but ok. The S25 series does have a 200MP sensor, so that helps somewhat. * smaller battery. Duh. It's a lighter phone. To be safe, I ordered a MagSafe case for it, and a magnetic snap on battery (baseus and anker sell low profile ones with 15W wireless charging, or 20W wired). You may need it for heavy use over a full day. PROS: * noticeably thinner and lighter than the S2x+ models, and perfectly balanced. The S24+ was too awkward for me to hold in landscape for hours while reading a book. This isn't. That's it. If you want thin and light, it's this or an iPhone Air. And Samsung just confirmed there will be NO S26 Edge. Get it new while you can. With a 40% off sale, plus a $290 trade in for my s24+, this was cheap. Compared to my old phone, this has a newer faster CPU, an extra year of updates, and twice the RAM. No regrets.
        MoreHide

        Top reviews from the United States

        • Eric shang
          5 out of 5 stars
          Sleek, Fast, and Packed with Features
          Reviewed in the United States on October 10, 2025
          Color: Titanium SilverSize: 256GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          The ultra-thin design is stunning—lightweight yet premium, with a titanium frame that feels durable and elegant. The 6.7" AMOLED display is vibrant and smooth, perfect for streaming and gaming.

          Performance is top-notch thanks to the Snapdragon 8 Elite chip. Everything runs fast and fluid, and the new Galaxy AI features are surprisingly useful for productivity and photo editing. The camera setup is solid, especially the 200MP main sensor, though I do miss having a telephoto lens.

          Battery life has been better than expected for such a slim phone, easily lasting a full day with moderate use. Charging is a bit slower than I’d like, but not a dealbreaker.

          Overall, I’m very happy with this purchase. It’s stylish, powerful, and feels like a true flagship. If you’re looking for a premium Android phone that stands out, the S25 Edge is a great choice.

          Read moreRead less
          25 people found this helpful

        • Eddie Calzone
          5 out of 5 stars
          Great phone, if you understand the trade-offs
          Reviewed in the United States on October 30, 2025
          Color: Titanium JetblackSize: 512GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          CONS:

          * no telephoto lens. That sucks, but ok. The S25 series does have a 200MP sensor, so that helps somewhat.

          * smaller battery. Duh. It's a lighter phone. To be safe, I ordered a MagSafe case for it, and a magnetic snap on battery (baseus and anker sell low profile ones with 15W wireless charging, or 20W wired). You may need it for heavy use over a full day.

          PROS:

          * noticeably thinner and lighter than the S2x+ models, and perfectly balanced. The S24+ was too awkward for me to hold in landscape for hours while reading a book. This isn't.

          That's it. If you want thin and light, it's this or an iPhone Air. And Samsung just confirmed there will be NO S26 Edge. Get it new while you can. With a 40% off sale, plus a $290 trade in for my s24+, this was cheap. Compared to my old phone, this has a newer faster CPU, an extra year of updates, and twice the RAM. No regrets.

          Read moreRead less
          Eddie Calzone

          Color: Titanium JetblackSize: 512GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase

          CONS:

          * no telephoto lens. That sucks, but ok. The S25 series does have a 200MP sensor, so that helps somewhat.

          * smaller battery. Duh. It's a lighter phone. To be safe, I ordered a MagSafe case for it, and a magnetic snap on battery (baseus and anker sell low profile ones with 15W wireless charging, or 20W wired). You may need it for heavy use over a full day.

          PROS:

          * noticeably thinner and lighter than the S2x+ models, and perfectly balanced. The S24+ was too awkward for me to hold in landscape for hours while reading a book. This isn't.

          That's it. If you want thin and light, it's this or an iPhone Air. And Samsung just confirmed there will be NO S26 Edge. Get it new while you can. With a 40% off sale, plus a $290 trade in for my s24+, this was cheap. Compared to my old phone, this has a newer faster CPU, an extra year of updates, and twice the RAM. No regrets.

        • Adrian
          5 out of 5 stars
          Very pleased with my purchase
          Reviewed in the United States on December 7, 2025
          Color: Titanium SilverSize: 512GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          The slimness of the device is out of this world, it's beautiful. I bought this on a sale and I am more than satisfied with it.

          I own an S24 Ultra and being a fan of Samsung bought this as a gift for my wife, we now have bunch of ecosystem neat things to do like having shared notes, reminders, easy and very fast way of transferring files with each other, and much more yet to explore.

          There are only 2 cameras but we are more than satisfied with the photos it takes, especially after moving from quite an old and incapable device.

          The device is very fast and smooth, the build quality is on top, the display is amazing (I mean it's Damsung after all), speakers are good, nothing to complain about. Even the battery being so small is totally enough for my wife to charge it once at night and she can comfortably use it throughout the day.

          Read moreRead less
          4 people found this helpful

        • Marcel
          5 out of 5 stars
          Crazy!!! Doesn’t Feel Like a Large Phone
          Reviewed in the United States on January 13, 2026
          Color: Titanium JetblackSize: 256GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          I’m usually not a fan of larger phones, so I went into this expecting it to feel bulky. That wasn’t the case at all. You honestly don’t get it until you hold it. The S25 Edge feels surprisingly light and well balanced, and it doesn’t have that oversized, awkward feel most big phones do.

          What stands out is how it sits in your hand. The thin profile makes it comfortable to hold and easy to use. It doesn’t feel top-heavy, and it slips into a pocket without feeling like a brick. The design does a lot of work here.

          Overall, this phone changed my opinion on larger devices. If you normally avoid big phones because they feel clunky or uncomfortable, this one is worth trying. On paper it’s a large phone, but in real use, it doesn’t feel like it.

          Read moreRead less

        • Jerlant360
          5 out of 5 stars
          Fantastic performance and sleek design!
          Reviewed in the United States on March 30, 2026
          Color: Titanium JetblackSize: 512GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          I’m really impressed with the S25 Edge. It’s incredibly fast, lightweight, and the cameras are top-tier. I was a bit worried about the battery life initially, but it easily lasts me the whole day with regular use.

          The only minor downside is that it gets a bit warm when emulating games with heavy shaders. However, it’s understandable given how powerful the processor is and how thin the phone’s body is. Overall, it's an excellent device!

        • B. A. Maxwell
          5 out of 5 stars
          Fantastic Phone! Fast, Lots of Storage, Built in Galaxy AI
          Reviewed in the United States on January 24, 2026
          Color: Titanium IcyblueSize: 256GBPattern Name: Phone Only
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          What a fantastic phone!

          Bought to replace my Galaxy S8 whose technology, not it's functionality, got left behind. Battery life is phenomenal. It was easy to get this phone added to my T-Mobile account using a digital SIM card. The Galaxy AI works great with a simple push of a button. My research shows they use an API from ChatGPT. I like that you can use this feature even with the phone locked.

          Camera is phenomenal, huge upgrade from my old S8.

          Great phone so far!

        Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge Phone, 512 GB AI Smartphone, Unlocked Android, Night Video, Fast Processor, ProScaler Display, All-Day Battery, 2025, US 1 Yr Manufacturer Warranty, Titanium JetBlack

        From Samsung

        4.5 out of 5 stars, 350 ratings

        Customer reviews

        Price

        Purchasing options

        Other sellers

        Other sellers

        About this Item

        • SUPER SLIM. SUPER LIGHT: Galaxy S25 Edge is surprisingly light and our slimmest S Series phone yet. You’ll want to show off this sleek, super-slim design that slips easily into your pocket or bag without bulking things up.
        • OUR POWERFUL 200MP CAMERA ON OUR SLIMMEST S SERIES PHONE: Capture every memory in stunning clarity with our highest-resolution camera on a Galaxy phone. Galaxy S25 Edge features a 200MP camera to preserve your memories with professional-level detail.
        • MORE POWER TO YOU: Reimagine what’s possible with Galaxy S25 Edge, featuring our most powerful processor yet. Effortlessly translate your calls, slow down a video or edit your photos without skipping a beat
        • NOT SLIM ON TOUGHNESS: Don’t let the sleek form of Galaxy S25 Edge fool you — this phone is tough too. With a titanium build and a Corning Gorilla Glass Ceramic 2 face, S25 Edge is as strong as it is stylish
        • VIRTUAL ASSISTANT, PERSONAL HELP: Streamline your day with an assistant that gets you. Ask it to Google search for a pet-friendly vegan restaurant nearby and text it to your friend — your Galaxy S25 Edge handles multiple tasks with a single ask.²
        • INSIGHTS THAT KEEP YOU A STEP AHEAD: Stay one step ahead with a phone that gives you the info you need before you even know you need it. Galaxy S25 Edge provides you with personalized insights to help you prepare for your day.³
        • REDUCE THE NOISE. REVEAL THE MAGIC: With Galaxy S25 Edge, you can capture wow-worthy videos, even in dark or noisy environments. Use Night Video to capture your evening out with friends in vivid detail. Then minimize unwanted sounds.⁴
        • CAPTURE EVERYONE'S GOOD SIDE EVERY TIME: Make every group pic perfect. It feels like in every photo, there is always one or two blinking or not smiling. With Galaxy S25 Edge, you can make sure everyone looks their best.⁵
        • SELFIES THAT STUN: Effortlessly elevate your selfie game on Galaxy S25 Edge. Galaxy AI recognizes your environment’s lighting and captures accurate skin tones and textures so each portrait brings out everyone’s best side — without the extra editing.⁵,⁶
        • A SHORTCUT TO YOUR BEST SHOTS: Looking for that picture of your dog wearing a leprechaun costume from St. Patrick’s Day? Simply describe the pic to your Galaxy S25 Edge and it finds it for you in seconds.

        Product Description

        Introducing Galaxy S25 Edge, our slimmest S Series phone yet¹ that’s packed with features without weighing down your lifestyle – and especially not your fit. It combines our powerful 200MP camera and an industry-leading processor into the ultimate lightweight device that you’ve been waiting for.

        Be ready to capture extraordinary moments with a high-resolution camera that lets you snap crystal-clear photos. At night, reveal the unseen with AI-powered Nightography for photos that shine bright.²

        With S25 Edge, you’ll always look your best too. Portrait Selfie enhances skin tones for a polished, natural look.³ And Best Face captures everyone’s good side every time — it can even save the day when someone in your group shot accidentally blinks.⁴

        Discover a true AI companion with a phone that does more for you. From daily briefings⁵ to knocking out multiple tasks with one ask,⁶ S25 Edge impressively handles your needs in seconds so you can spend more time doing other things you love.

        But don’t be fooled by its slim size. S25 Edge is made with a tough titanium frame and a durable Corning ® Gorilla® Glass Ceramic 2 face that stands up to your day. It’s powerful too, with a processor that handles AI features flawlessly and an all-day battery built to keep up with all you do.⁷

        Galaxy S25 Edge: Packed with features. Light on your fit.

        ¹Excluding camera lenses.

        ²Galaxy Al basic features provided by Samsung are free. Any Samsung enhanced Al features and all third-party Al features are subject to different terms and may be subject to fees. (Galaxy Al basic features are listed under "Advanced intelligence" in Samsung Services Terms and Conditions.).

        ³Results may vary depending on light condition and/or shooting condition including multiple subjects, being out of subject, or moving subjects.

        ⁴Motion Photo must be turned on. Best Face captures a Motion Photo up to 3 seconds. Will identify and provide results for up to 5 people. Resulting image up to 12MP.

        ⁵Displays daily select information from select apps (some apps may require internet connection and/or consent to access data). Personal data intelligence must be enabled.

        ⁶Compatible with select apps. Requires Google Gemini account. Results may vary based on input; check responses for accuracy. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC.

        ⁷Based on average battery life under typical usage conditions. Average expected performance based on typical use. Actual battery life depends on factors such as network, features selected, frequency of calls, and voice, data, and other application usage patterns. Results may vary. Charger not included. Use only Samsung approved chargers and cables. Do not use worn or damaged chargers or cables. An incompatible charger or cable can cause damage to your device and/or serious injuries.
